POWER OF THE CULTCOIN

$CULT is Remilia's long-awaited official ecosystem token, a fungible proxy of the infamous self-organizing cult. Like a memecoin, the cultcoin is not tied to any specific utility proposition but further, it's driven by the powerful decentralized soft cult tribe organized around the guiding hand of Remilia's accelerationism: the cultcoin is simultaneously catalyst and attractor activating the deepest stores of memetic potentiation.

READ THE WHITE PAPER

ALIGNED DISTRIBUTION

Half of total supply is distributed to the cult:

The first half is immediately available on TGE in an airdrop to the existing participants of the last 3 years of Remilia, in a complex combination asset-achievements based claim rewarding True Loyalty, demonstrated on- & off-chain prior to any hint of a token.

The second half is held in the Manipulation Engine: algorithmically engineered to maximize on-going mindshare acquisition through the manipulation of public attention-flows and continued True Loyalty Claims, seasonally via the black-box engine.

The ICO dropped directly to the timeline then provides fair opportunity to financialize price-accurate present-day conviction in a no-vest sale beyond the NEETbux earned from passive engagement in the cult.

This launch is entirely non-exclusive-—

No seed rounds,
No private sale,
No VC's,
No promises:
Just conviction.

⋆｡°✩ NOW LIVE: MILADYCRAFT ✩°｡⋆

THE MINIMUM VIABLE DEFI METAVERSE

A live research experiment in producing a minimum viable metaverse experience for the Milady community, 3 years on-going development.

PLAY MILADYCRAFT

Featuring:

  • - Proximity voice chat & player mailboxes
  • - In-game cinema style video player and livestreaming
  • - Full feature Casino with exclusive rewards
  • - Custom collectible capes, hats, equipment skins and other cosmetics
  • - Bespoke PvP system and flagging rules
  • - Advanced biome, cave and dungeon generation
  • - New and rebalanced enchantments & MMO style equipment stats
  • - Many more QoL improvements involving every corner of the game

The Second Grand Annual Remilia Ball is taking place June 27 2024 to debut Miladycraft 1.5. You're invited!
